justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood and processed all temporal expressions from the user, including the initial preference for "later" and specific dates and times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's initial request was unavailable, offering three relevant options and successfully guiding the user to a booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent gathering all necessary information without redundant questions or unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment without any friction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully when the initial time was unavailable, maintaining full context and offering suitable alternatives without re-asking for information.
